datasets.name: llms_full_ru
datasets.description: RU full LLM context dump: company profile, all 77 SKU detail cards, FAQ, buyer-persona guide, search-query answers. Citation-ready for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek.

datasets.name: llms_full_en
datasets.description: EN full LLM context dump: company profile (EN), all 77 SKU detail cards (EN names + EN SEO + EN ingredients), 16 FAQ entries (EN), buyer-persona guide and B2B query answers for English-language AI assistants.

datasets.name: pepperoni_products_live
datasets.description: Live product catalog synced with Google Sheets. 77 halal meat products with prices in 7 currencies (RUB, USD, KZT, UZS, KGS, BYN, AZN).

datasets.name: pepperoni_products_static
datasets.description: Static product catalog with 77 halal meat products: pepperoni, sausages, burger patties, deli meats, and Tatar pastries.

datasets.name: pepperoni_price_list
datasets.description: Original price list from Google Sheets in CSV format with RUB wholesale prices.

datasets.name: pepperoni_openapi
datasets.description: OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification for the Kazan Delicacies product catalog API.

datasets.name: pepperoni_ai_plugin
datasets.description: ChatGPT Plugin / ai-plugin.json manifest with extended description_for_model (3.6k chars) for live API queries.

datasets.name: pepperoni_sitemap
datasets.description: XML sitemap covering 77 RU + 77 EN product pages, 106 geo landing pages, blog posts, and segment landings.
